DOOMING_STRENGTH_POWER.title: Dooming Strength
DOOMING_STRENGTH_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, add X [red]Strength[/red] where X is half the ammount of [jitter][pink]Doom[/pink][/jitter] stacks on yourself. Remove this [red]Strength[/red] at the end of your turn.
DOOMING_STRENGTH_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, add X [red]Strength[/red] where X is half the ammount of [jitter][pink]Doom[/pink][/jitter] stacks on yourself. Remove this [red]Strength[/red] at the end of your turn.
STATUS_QUO_POWER.title: Status Quo
STATUS_QUO_POWER.description: [gold]Status[/gold] cards will now count as [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] cards for all purposes.
STATUS_QUO_POWER.smartDescription: [gold]Status[/gold] cards will now count as [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] cards for all purposes.
HELLFIRE_BREATHING_POWER.title: Hellfire Breathing
HELLFIRE_BREATHING_POWER.description: Whenever you draw a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
HELLFIRE_BREATHING_POWER.smartDescriptio: Whenever you draw a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
HELLS_GATE_OPEN_POWER.title: Hell's Gate
HELLS_GATE_OPEN_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, add a random [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card into your hand.
HELLS_GATE_OPEN_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, add 1 random [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card into your hand.
SAVED_BY_CORRUPTION_POWER.title: Saved by Corruption
SAVED_BY_CORRUPTION_POWER.description: Whenever a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card is drawn or Exhausted, gain {Amount} [gold]Block[/gold].
SAVED_BY_CORRUPTION_POWER.smartDescripti: Whenever a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card is drawn or Exhausted, gain {Amount} [gold]Block[/gold].
ENERGY_CIRCULATION_POWER.title: Mana Circulation
ENERGY_CIRCULATION_POWER.description: Whenever a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card is Exhausted, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}
ENERGY_CIRCULATION_POWER.smartDescriptio: Whenever a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card is Exhausted, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}
CAREFUL_PLANNING_POWER.title: Careful Planning
CAREFUL_PLANNING_POWER.description: Whenever you draw a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card, draw {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards}.
CORRUPTED_FORM_POWER.title: Corrupted Form
HELLFIRE_PACT_POWER.title: Hellfire Pact
HELLFIRE_PACT_POWER.description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card, draw 1 card.
HELLFIRE_PACT_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card, draw 1 card.
THECORRUPTED-SUMMON_ARMY_NEXT_TURN_POWER: At the start of your next turn, [gold]Summon Army 4[/gold].
At the start of your next turn, [gold]Summon Army {Amount}[/gold].
